issues.title: When is the official release of Spring AI planned?
issues.body:
**Description**:  
Hello,  
I have been following the development of Spring AI with great interest and noticed that some early versions have already been released. Could you kindly share the planned release date for the official version? Additionally, is there a public roadmap or set of milestones that developers can refer to?  

Thank you for your hard work on this project. I’m eagerly looking forward to its progress!  

**Expected Outcome**:  
1. Information on the planned release date for the official version.  
2. Access to a public roadmap or development milestones, if available.

comments.body:
I second this. 

I have several projects in pipeline waiting to be productionised. I've been using Spring AI since 0.8.6. 

It will be great to see when the 1.0 release is on the horizon. We don't want to use snapshot versions in live projects.

Here is the Timeline: https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/milestones even though there is no planned date for release official version.

But asked LLM & got this info:

Here's the milestone history summary:

1.0.0-M5: Closed on December 24, 2024
1.0.0-M4: Closed on November 21, 2024
1.0.0-M3: Closed on October 9, 2024
1.0.0-M2: Closed on September 4, 2024
1.0.0-M1: Closed on May 29, 2024

**Observations:**

**Average Time Between Milestones:**
M2 → M3: ~35 days
M3 → M4: ~43 days
M4 → M5: ~33 days
Average time per milestone = ~37 days

**Current Milestones Remaining:**
1.0.0-M6: Due by January 31, 2025
1.0.0-RC1: No due date
1.0.0: No due date

**Estimation:**
1.0.0-M6:
Likely to be completed on schedule by January 31, 2025.

1.0.0-RC1:
If we assume ~37 days per milestone, RC1 could be completed by early to mid-March 2025.

1.0.0:
Assuming the final release takes ~37 days after RC1, we can expect the official release around late April to early May 2025.

**Prediction:**
Spring AI 1.0.0 Official Release: **April 30, 2025** (± 1-2 weeks depending on complexity or delays).

Thank you for the detailed analysis and the milestone information! Based on your estimation, the official release of Spring AI 1.0.0 is likely to be around late April to early May 2025, and your prediction is very helpful.

With the timeline now clear, I'll go ahead and close this issue. Thanks again for your assistance!

Usually between Rc and GA is a shorter period as only docs and testing remain.

Anyway, we are working hard to get there, focusing on design issues and the November surprise of MCP added some significant scope.

Thanks for hanging in there.
